Based on the tests and the structure, I need to:\n\n1. **HyperLogLog**:\n   - Constructor takes `int16_t n_bits` (the precision bits)\n   - Need to store cardinality\n   - Need to store registers (one for each possible hash prefix combination)\n   - AddElem hashes the element and updates registers\n   - ComputeCardinality computes the estimated cardinality from registers\n   - The algorithm:\n     - Hash each element to a 64-bit hash\n     - Use the first `n_bits` bits as a bucket index\n     - Use the remaining bits to find the position of the leftmost 1\n     - Store the maximum position for each bucket\n     - Cardinality = CONSTANT * 2^(n_bits) * 2^(average of max positions)\n\n2. **HyperLogLogPresto**:\n   - Similar to HyperLogLog but uses dense and overflow buckets\n   - Dense bucket stores the regular registers\n   - Overflow bucket stores overflow values for sparse data\n\nLet me start by modifying the hash_util.h file.","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":6,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1531,"cache_read_input_tokens":54267,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1531},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"eadc38c2-5090-4e54-ae85-8101b8323428","uuid":"ec09d440-e8b6-4c76-97fa-ff775748d118"}

For each element:\n   - Hash it to a 64-bit value\n   - Use the first `n_bits` bits as the bucket index\n   - In the remaining bits, find the position of the leftmost 1 (also called leading zeros + 1)\n   - Store the maximum position for each bucket\n3.  // 2^n_bits\n    registers_.assign(m_, 0);\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeBinary(const hash_t &hash) const -> std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> {\n  return std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY>(hash);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the leftmost 1 bit (rho function)\n  // This is equivalent to finding the number of leading zeros + 1\n  for (uint64_t i = BITSET_CAPACITY; i > 0; --i) {\n    if (bset[i - 1]) {\n      return BITSET_CAPACITY - i + 1;\n    }\n  }\n  return BITSET_CAPACITY + 1;\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> binary = ComputeBinary(hash);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_bits_;\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> remaining_bits(remaining);\n\n  // Find position of leftmost one in remaining bits\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(remaining_bits);\n\n  // Update the register with the maximum rho value\n  if (bucket_idx < registers_.size()) {\n    registers_[bucket_idx] = std::max(registers_[bucket_idx], static_cast<uint8_t>(rho));\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Standard HyperLogLog cardinality estimation formula\n  // cardinality = CONSTANT * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[i]))\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(registers_[i]));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    uint32_t zeros = 0;\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n      if (registers_[i] == 0) {\n        zeros++;\n      }\n    }\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":4,"cache_creation_input_tokens":599,"cache_read_input_tokens":56523,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":599},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"eadc38c2-5090-4e54-ae85-8101b8323428","uuid":"e134d293-0d09-4138-b461-1169fa731297"}

 // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(m_, 0);\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_leading_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Calculate rho (position of leftmost 1 bit in remaining)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  if (remaining == 0) {\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count leading zeros and add 1\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ - __builtin_clzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  uint8_t dense_val = static_cast<uint8_t>(rho & ((1U << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n  uint8_t overflow_val = static_cast<uint8_t>((rho >> DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) & ((1U << OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(bucket_idx) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho from dense and overflow\n    uint64_t current_rho = current_dense | (static_cast<uint64_t>(current_overflow) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n    uint64_t new_rho = rho;\n\n    if (new_rho > current_rho) {\n      dense_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n      if (overflow_val > 0) {\n        overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":850,"cache_read_input_tokens":58707,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":850},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"eadc38c2-5090-4e54-ae85-8101b8323428","uuid":"8ec6bf53-ea88-47c4-8605-cf545d466fd8"}

 // 2^n_bits\n    registers_.assign(m_, 0);\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeBinary(const hash_t &hash) const -> std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> {\n  return std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY>(hash);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the leftmost 1 bit (rho function)\n  // This is equivalent to finding the number of leading zeros + 1\n  for (uint64_t i = BITSET_CAPACITY; i > 0; --i) {\n    if (bset[i - 1]) {\n      return BITSET_CAPACITY - i + 1;\n    }\n  }\n  return BITSET_CAPACITY + 1;\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> binary = ComputeBinary(hash);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_bits_;\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> remaining_bits(remaining);\n\n  // Find position of leftmost one in remaining bits\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(remaining_bits);\n\n  // Update the register with the maximum rho value\n  if (bucket_idx < registers_.size()) {\n    registers_[bucket_idx] = std::max(registers_[bucket_idx], static_cast<uint8_t>(rho));\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Standard HyperLogLog cardinality estimation formula\n  // cardinality = CONSTANT * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[i]))\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(registers_[i]));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    uint32_t zeros = 0;\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n      if (registers_[i] == 0) {\n        zeros++;\n      }\n    }\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<std::string>;\n\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":7,"newStart":42,"newLines":6,"lines":["   std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);"," ","   hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);","-  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> binary = ComputeBinary(hash);"," ","   // Extract bucket index from the first n_bits","   uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_bits_) - 1);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count trailing zeros and add 1\n    rho = __builtin_ctzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  // Dense bucket stores low DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  // Overflow bucket stores next OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  uint8_t dense_val = static_cast<uint8_t>(rho & ((1U << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n  uint8_t overflow_val = static_cast<uint8_t>((rho >> DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) & ((1U << OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(bucket_idx) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho from dense and overflow\n    uint64_t current_rho = current_dense | (static_cast<uint64_t>(current_overflow) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n    uint64_t new_rho = rho;\n\n    if (new_rho > current_rho) {\n      dense_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n      if (overflow_val > 0) {\n        overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub","originalFile":"#include \"primer/hyperloglog_presto.h\"\n\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <cstring>\n\nnamespace bustub {\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nHyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::HyperLogLogPresto(int16_t n_leading_bits) : cardinality_(0), n_leading_bits_(n_leading_bits) {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    m_ = 0;\n    dense_bucket_.clear();\n    overflow_bucket_.clear();\n  } else {\n    m_ = 1U << n_leading_bits_; n_bits) : cardinality_(0), n_bits_(n_bits) {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    m_ = 0;\n    registers_.clear();\n  } else {\n    m_ = 1U << n_bits_;  // 2^n_bits\n    registers_.assign(m_, 0);\n <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the first 1 bit from the right (1-indexed)\n  // This is equivalent to finding the trailing zeros + 1\n  hash_t value = bset.to_ullong();\n\n  if (value == 0) {\n    return BITSET_CAPACITY + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Count trailing zeros and cardinality estimation formula\n  // cardinality = CONSTANT * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[i]))\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(registers_[i]));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.assign(m_, 0);\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_leading_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from left, 1-indexed)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  if (remaining == 0) {\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count leading zeros and add 1\n    rho = __builtin_clzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  // Dense bucket stores low DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  // Overflow bucket stores next OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  uint8_t dense_val = static_cast<uint8_t>(rho & ((1U << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n  uint8_t overflow_val = static_cast<uint8_t>((rho >> DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) & ((1U << OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(bucket_idx) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho from dense and overflow\n    uint64_t current_rho = current_dense | (static_cast<uint64_t>(current_overflow) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n    uint64_t new_rho = rho;\n\n    if (new_rho > current_rho) {\n      dense_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n      if (overflow_val > 0) {\n        overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":34,"oldLines":13,"newStart":34,"newLines":13,"lines":["   // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits","   hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;"," ","-  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from left, 1-indexed)","+  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from right, 1-indexed)","   uint64_t rho = 0;","   if (remaining == 0) {","     rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // 2^n_bits\n    registers_.assign(m_, 0);\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeBinary(const hash_t &hash) const -> std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> {\n  return std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY>(hash);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the first 1 bit from the right (1-indexed)\n  // This is the position of the rightmost 1-bit, also known as rho\n  hash_t value = bset.to_ullong();\n\n  if (value == 0) {\n    return BITSET_CAPACITY + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Count trailing zeros and add 1 to get the position (1-indexed from right)\n  return __builtin_ctzll(value) + 1;\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_bits (using the lowest bits)\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_bits_;\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> remaining_bits(remaining);\n\n  // Find position of first one (from right) in remaining bits\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(remaining_bits);\n\n  // Update the register with the maximum rho value\n  if (bucket_idx < registers_.size()) {\n    registers_[bucket_idx] = std::max(registers_[bucket_idx], static_cast<uint8_t>(rho));\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Standard HyperLogLog cardinality estimation formula\n  // cardinality = CONSTANT * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[i]))\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(registers_[i]));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    uint32_t zeros = 0;\n    for (uint32_t i = 0;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    dense_bucket_.resize(m_);  // Initialize with default bitset(0)\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_leading_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from right, 1-indexed)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  if (remaining == 0) {\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count trailing zeros and add 1\n    rho = __builtin_ctzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  // Dense bucket stores low DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  // Overflow bucket stores next OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  uint8_t dense_val = static_cast<uint8_t>(rho & ((1U << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n  uint8_t overflow_val = static_cast<uint8_t>((rho >> DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) & ((1U << OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(bucket_idx) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho from dense and overflow\n    uint64_t current_rho = current_dense | (static_cast<uint64_t>(current_overflow) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n    uint64_t new_rho = rho;\n\n    if (new_rho > current_rho) {\n      dense_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n      if (overflow_val > 0) {\n        overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":14,"oldLines":7,"newStart":14,"newLines":9,"lines":["     overflow_bucket_.clear();","   } else {","     m_ = 1U << n_leading_bits_;  // 2^n_leading_bits","-    dense_bucket_.resize(m_);  // Initialize with default bitset(0)","+    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {","+      dense_bucket_.emplace_back(0);","+    }","   }"," }"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

function instead of generalizing or restructuring existing ones\n3. **Copy-paste with slight variation**: near-duplicate code blocks that should be unified with a shared abstraction\n4. **Leaky abstractions**: exposing internal details that should be encapsulated, or breaking existing abstraction boundaries\n5. **Stringly-typed code**: using raw strings where constants, enums (string unions), or branded types already exist in the codebase\n\n### Agent 3: Efficiency Review\n\nReview the same changes for efficiency:\n\n1. **Unnecessary work**: redundant computations, repeated file startup or per-request/per-render hot paths\n4. **Unnecessary existence checks**: pre-checking file/resource existence before operating (TOCTOU anti-pattern) — operate directly and handle the error\n5. **Memory**: unbounded data structures, missing cleanup, event listener leaks\n6. **Overly broad operations**: reading entire files when only a portion is needed, loading all items when  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n      dense_bucket_.emplace_back(0);\n    }\n  }\n}","originalFile":"#include \"primer/hyperloglog_presto.h\"\n\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <cstring>\n\nnamespace bustub {\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nHyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::HyperLogLogPresto(int16_t n_leading_bits) : cardinality_(0), n_leading_bits_(n_leading_bits) {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    m_ = 0;\n    dense_bucket_.clear();\n    overflow_bucket_.clear();\n  } else {\n    m_ = 1U << n_leading_bits_;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n      dense_bucket_.emplace_back(0);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_leading_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from right, 1-indexed)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  if (remaining == 0) {\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count trailing zeros and add 1\n    rho = __builtin_ctzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  // Dense bucket stores low DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  // Overflow bucket stores next OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  uint8_t dense_val = static_cast<uint8_t>(rho & ((1U << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n  uint8_t overflow_val = static_cast<uint8_t>((rho >> DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) & ((1U << OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(bucket_idx) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho from dense and overflow\n    uint64_t current_rho = current_dense | (static_cast<uint64_t>(current_overflow) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n    uint64_t new_rho = rho;\n\n    if (new_rho > current_rho) {\n      dense_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n      if (overflow_val > 0) {\n        overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":8,"oldLines":7,"newStart":8,"newLines":7,"lines":[" "," template <typename KeyType>"," HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::HyperLogLogPresto(int16_t n_leading_bits) : cardinality_(0), n_leading_bits_(n_leading_bits) {","-  if (n_leading_bits_ <= 0) {","+  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0) {","     m_ = 0;","     dense_bucket_.clear();","     overflow_bucket_.clear();"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

i < m_; ++i) {\n      if (registers_[i] == 0) {\n        zeros++;\n      }\n    }\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<std::string>;\n\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":63,"oldLines":7,"newStart":63,"newLines":7,"lines":[" "," template <typename KeyType>"," auto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {","-  if (n_bits_ <= 0) {","+  if (n_bits_ < 0) {","     cardinality_ = 0;","     return;","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

I'm getting 1 instead of 2, 7, etc. This suggests my rho calculation or the HyperLogLog formula itself is wrong.\n\nLet me think about this more carefully. The HyperLogLog algorithm works as follows:\n1. For each element, hash it to get a bit pattern\n2. Extract the first p bits as the bucket index\n3. For the remaining bits, count the leading zeros (rho function)\n4. Store the maximum rho value for each bucket\n5. Estimate cardinality using: cardinality = alpha * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[j]))\n\nNow in my implementation, I'm using `__builtin_ctzll(remaining) + 1` which counts TRAILING zeros from the right. But the actual rho function in HyperLogLog should count LEADING zeros from the left!\n\nWait, let me think again. Looking at the standard HyperLogLog paper:\n- We have a hash value\n- We extract the first p bits as the bucket index\n- We look at the remaining bits: w = max(leftmost 1 bit position in remaining bits, p+1)\n- The position is counted from the left (most significant bits)\n\nSo I should be using leading zeros, not trailing zeros!\n\nLet me reconsider. Actually the issue might be more subtle. Let me check the paper again:\n- rho(w) = position of the first 1-bit in w (from the left), i.e., number of leading zeros + 1\n\nSo for a 64-bit hash:\n- If we shift right by n_bits to remove the bucket index\n- The remaining value might be something like 0x00FF... (many leading zeros)\n- We count leading zeros and add 1\n\nSo I should use `__builtin_clzll(remaining) + 1`. i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":36,"oldLines":13,"newStart":36,"newLines":13,"lines":["   // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits","   hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;"," ","-  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from left, 1-indexed)","+  // Calculate rho (count of trailing zeros in remaining bits)","   uint64_t rho = 0;","   if (remaining == 0) {","-    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // 2^n_leading_bits\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n      dense_bucket_.emplace_back(0);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_leading_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from left, 1-indexed)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  if (remaining == 0) {\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count leading zeros and add 1 to get rho\n    rho = __builtin_clzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  // Dense bucket stores low DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  // Overflow bucket stores next OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  uint8_t dense_val = static_cast<uint8_t>(rho & ((1U << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n  uint8_t overflow_val = static_cast<uint8_t>((rho >> DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE) & ((1U << OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE) - 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(bucket_idx) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      current_overflow = overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho from dense and overflow\n    uint64_t current_rho = current_dense | (static_cast<uint64_t>(current_overflow) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n    uint64_t new_rho = rho;\n\n    if (new_rho > current_rho) {\n      dense_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE>(dense_val);\n      if (overflow_val > 0) {\n        overflow_bucket_[bucket_idx] = std::bitset<OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE>(overflow_val);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    uint8_t dense_val = dense_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t overflow_val = 0;\n\n    if (overflow_bucket_.find(i) != overflow_bucket_.end()) {\n      overflow_val = overflow_bucket_[i].to_ulong();\n    }\n\n    // Reconstruct the full rho value\n    uint64_t rho = dense_val | (static_cast<uint64_t>(overflow_val) << DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE);\n\n    if (rho == 0) {\n      zeros++;\n    }\n\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(rho));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<uint64_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLogPresto<std::string>;\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":108,"oldLines":7,"newStart":108,"newLines":7,"lines":["   // Small range correction","   if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {","     if (zeros != 0) {","-      estimate = m_ * std::log(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));","+      estimate = m_ * std::log2(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));","     }","   }","   // Large range correction"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

I think the condition might be inverted—the correction should only trigger for extremely large estimates, like E > 10^12 as in the original Flajolet paper.  // 2^n_bits\n    registers_.resize(m_, 0);  // Initialize registers to 0\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeBinary(const hash_t &hash) const -> std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> {\n  return std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY>(hash);\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::PositionOfLeftmostOne(const std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> &bset) const -> uint64_t {\n  // Find the position of the leftmost 1 bit (rho function)\n  // Count leading zeros and add 1\n  hash_t value = bset.to_ullong();\n\n  if (value == 0) {\n    return BITSET_CAPACITY + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Count leading zeros and add 1 to get rho\n  return __builtin_clzll(value) + 1;\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::AddElem(KeyType val) -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_bits (using the lowest bits)\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_bits_;\n  std::bitset<BITSET_CAPACITY> remaining_bits(remaining);\n\n  // Find position of first one (from right) in remaining bits\n  uint64_t rho = PositionOfLeftmostOne(remaining_bits);\n\n  // Update the register with the maximum rho value\n  if (bucket_idx < registers_.size()) {\n    registers_[bucket_idx] = std::max(registers_[bucket_idx], static_cast<uint8_t>(rho));\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename KeyType>\nauto HyperLogLog<KeyType>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_bits_ < 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Standard HyperLogLog cardinality estimation formula\n  // cardinality = CONSTANT * m^2 / sum(2^(-M[i]))\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n    raw_estimate += std::pow(2.0, -static_cast<double>(registers_[i]));\n  }\n\n  double estimate = CONSTANT * static_cast<double>(m_) * static_cast<double>(m_) / raw_estimate;\n\n  // Small range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    uint32_t zeros = 0;\n    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n      if (registers_[i] == 0) {\n        zeros++;\n      }\n    }\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log2(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range correction\n  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {\n    // No correction needed\n  } else {\n    estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));\n  }\n\n  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(estimate + 0.5);\n}\n\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<int64_t>;\ntemplate class HyperLogLog<std::string>;\n\n}  // namespace bustub\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":91,"oldLines":14,"newStart":91,"newLines":13,"lines":["       estimate = m_ * std::log2(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));","     }","   }","-  // Large range correction","-  else if (estimate <= (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32)) {","-    // No correction needed","-  } else {","+  // Large range correction (only for very large values where estimate > 2^32)","+  if (estimate > (1.0 / 30.0) * (1ULL << 32) && estimate <= static_cast<double>(1ULL << 32)) {","+    // For large values close to 2^32, apply correction","     estimate = -1.0 * (1ULL << 32) * std::log(1.0 - estimate / (1ULL << 32));","   }"," ","-  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(estimate + 0.5);","+  cardinality_ = static_cast<size_t>(std::max(0.0, estimate) + 0.5);"," }"," "," template class HyperLogLog<int64_t>;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

}\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  hash_t hash = CalculateHash(val);\n\n  // Extract bucket index from the first n_leading_bits\n  uint32_t bucket_idx = hash & ((1U << n_leading_bits_) - 1);\n\n  // Get remaining bits after removing the bucket index bits\n  hash_t remaining = hash >> n_leading_bits_;\n\n  // Calculate rho (position of first 1 bit from left, 1-indexed)\n  uint64_t rho = 0;\n  if (remaining == 0) {\n    rho = 64 - n_leading_bits_ + 1;  // Maximum rho when no bits are set\n  } else {\n    // Count leading zeros and add 1 to get rho\n    rho = __builtin_clzll(remaining) + 1;\n  }\n\n  // Store rho in dense and overflow buckets\n  // Dense bucket stores low DENSE_BUCKET_SIZE bits\n  // Overflow bucket stores next OVERFLOW_BUCKET_SIZE 1));\n\n  // Update dense bucket with maximum value\n  if (bucket_idx < dense_bucket_.size()) {\n    uint8_t current_dense = dense_bucket_[bucket_idx].to_ulong();\n    uint8_t current_overflow = 0;\n }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\ntemplate <typename T>\nauto HyperLogLogPresto<T>::ComputeCardinality() -> void {\n  if (n_leading_bits_ < 0) {\n    cardinality_ = 0;\n    return;\n  }\n\n  std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_);\n\n  // Compute cardinality using standard HyperLogLog formula\n  double raw_estimate = 0.0;\n  uint32_t zeros = 0;\n\n  for (uint32_t i = 0; i < m_; ++i) {\n range correction\n  if (estimate <= 2.5 * m_) {\n    if (zeros != 0) {\n      estimate = m_ * std::log2(static_cast<double>(m_) / static_cast<double>(zeros));\n    }\n  }\n  // Large range
